narrative:
Addison Twp (precinct in Gallia County) has 749 registered voters, with 53.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.8 percentage points.
